title: Kingdom of Daldar
description: Welcome... to the kingdom of Daldar! How long can you survive these dangerous medieval lands, where threats lurk at ever corner?
body:
# World of Daldar by ForgeLabs ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
Welcome... to the kingdom of Daldar! How long can you survive these dangerous medieval lands, where threats lurk at ever corner? The Kingdom of Daldar is a survival based modpack where players are put into a medieval world full ripe for exploration and challenges.
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png) ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Notice Shaders are supported out of the box. Go to Options > Video Settings > Shaderpacks and choose a shader to use.
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Socials


![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
